payload.title: Migration: backfill event log from existing workspaces
payload.description:
One-time migration: backfill the event log from existing workspaces so current users lose no history.

## Work
- Synthesize an event stream from current state + ticket_history: ticket.create with INITIAL values (from first history old_value), then set_field per history row, plus comment.add / relation.add.
- Run automatically on first launch when .scope/events/ is absent but scope.db exists.

## Acceptance
- Migrating this workspace (SCP) yields an event log that replays to today's exact board. Idempotent.
